FUN-1: The system concerns people and locations.
FUN-2: People are permanently assigned the authorization to access certain locations.
FUN-3: A person which is in a location must be authorized to be there.
FUN-5: A person willing to pass through a turnsile puts its card in the fence of the card reader.
FUN-6: If the person is accepted, the green light is lit and the turnstile is unblocked for at most 30 seconds.
FUN-7: If the person is not accepted, the red light is lit for 2 seconds and the turnstile remains blocked.
FUN-8: As soon as an accepted person has gone through an unblocked turnstile, the green light is turned off and the turnstile is blocked again.
FUN-9: If nobody goes through an unblocked turnstile during the 30 seconds period, the green light is turned off and the turnstile is blocked again.
EQP-1: Each person receives a personal magnetic card.
EQP-2: Each entrance and exit of a location is equipped with a card reader.
EQP-3: Each card reader has two lights: one green light and one red light.
EQP-6: A sensor detects the passage of a person through a turnstile.
SAF-1: No persons must remain blocked in a location.
SAF-2: Any person authorized to be in a location must also be authorized to go in another location which communicates with the first one.
SAF-3: Any person authorized to be in a location which is not “outside”, must also be authorized to be in another location communicating with the former and leading towards outside.
